autor: I feel it as few others do. Often — and in my inmost self perhaps all the time — I doubt whether I am a human being.
explicacao: Citação de I feel it as few others do. Often — and in my inmost self perhaps all the time — I doubt whether I am a human being. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life is merely terrible” articula reflexao, franz-kafka, merely em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
